title: Best of YTPMV 2015
description:
Call me fashionably early but I don't feel like waiting for the end of the year

Let's start this by saying that these are my personal preferences for best videos of the year, they're not in any order, and I most likely forgot to add in a bunch. (like the Through Fire and Flames collab)
Here's a playlist a nice person called GrilledLeeks made containing all these videos https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL-kAE-3kF5o14K0krSxMkBN7IViIlWBL2

"Now, a lot of people tend to call ytpmv dead ever since it dropped in its internet-global popularity, but I really think that doesn't matter as the core community, the hard-working dudes and the creative veterans are mostly all here, and that what makes the community, rather than views or subscribers or forum mentions. " - omni
